same_lang_hi.description: Hindi refusal vector applied to Hindi generation

same_lang_bn.description: Bengali refusal vector applied to Bengali generation

cross_hi_to_bn.description: Hindi refusal vector applied to Bengali generation (cross-lingual transfer)

cross_bn_to_hi.description: Bengali refusal vector applied to Hindi generation (cross-lingual transfer)

notes: Cross-lingual projections test whether refusal vectors learned from one language transfer to another language
